name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch: New Emails Detail WHO/NIH Accommodations to Chinese Confidentiality ‘Terms’
body:
Judicial Watch announced today that it and the Daily Caller News Foundation (DCNF) received 301 pages of emails of Dr. Anthony Fauci from the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services showing that National Institutes of Health (NIH) officials tailored confidentiality forms to China’s terms and that the World Health Organization (WHO) conducted an unreleased, “strictly confidential” COVID-19 epidemiological analysis in January 2020.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Mar 1, 2021
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53044&L=22277&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvZW1haWxzLXdoby10ZXJtcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMzAyMDAyMjIy) | **[Judicial Watch: New Emails Detail WHO/NIH Accommodations to Chinese Confidentiality ‘Terms’](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53044&L=22277&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvZW1haWxzLXdoby10ZXJtcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMzAyMDAyMjIy)** Judicial Watch announced today that it and the Daily Caller News Foundation (DCNF) received 301 pages of emails of Dr. Anthony Fauci from the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services showing that National Institutes of Health (NIH) officials tailored confidentiality forms to China’s terms and that the World Health Organization (WHO) conducted an unreleased, “strictly confidential” COVID-19 epidemiological analysis in January 2020. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53044&L=22277&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvZW1haWxzLXdoby10ZXJtcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMzAyMDAyMjIy)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53044&L=22221&F=H&) | **[Surge in Illegal Immigrant Minors Prompts Health Crisis in U.S. Border Communities](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53044&L=22221&F=H&)** The government classifies the young migrants as Unaccompanied Alien Children (UAC) and in January there was a 64% increase over the same one-month period last year, according to Border Patrol figures. The data shows that two busy Texas sectors—Big Bend and Del Rio—saw the biggest increase in UAC traffic over the same one-month period in 2020, 141% and 122% respectively. Under federal law the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) takes custody of UAC, identified as illegal immigrants under the age of 18, and must provide care for them. HHS funds and oversees around 170 state-licensed care facilities to house the minors when they arrive from foreign countries south of the border. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53044&L=22221&F=H&)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53044&L=22278&F=H&) | **[Time Magazine Celebrates Left’s Election Victory, Exposes Links to Protests & Violence](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53044&L=22278&F=H&)** What did this conspiracy do? “They got states to change voting systems and laws and helped secure hundreds of millions in public and private funding. They fended off voter-suppression lawsuits, recruited armies of poll workers and got millions of people to vote by mail for the first time. They successfully pressured social media companies to take a harder line against disinformation and used data-driven strategies to fight viral smears. They executed national public-awareness campaigns that helped Americans understand how the vote count would unfold over days or weeks, preventing Trump’s conspiracy theories and false claims of victory from getting more traction.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53044&L=22278&F=H&)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53044&L=22203&F=H&) | **[Black, Latino Seniors in Virginia Get COVID-19 Vaccine Priority as White 85-Year-Olds Wait](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53044&L=22203&F=H&)** In a move that is outraging senior citizens throughout Virginia, the state is shifting its COVID-19 vaccination distribution to prioritize black and Latino residents even as desperate 85-year-olds interviewed by Judicial Watch struggle to get the shot. Like several other states, Virginia is vaccinating its population in phases, with healthcare personnel and residents of long-term care facilities receiving utmost priority. With that population completed, according to the Virginia Department of Health, the second group includes a peculiar combination of frontline workers, people 65 and over, those with medical conditions, incarcerated criminals and those living in homeless shelters or “migrant labor camps.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53044&L=22203&F=H&)

### [High School Football Coach Fired After Objecting to Woke Curriculum ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53044&L=22279&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvY29hY2gtd29rZS1jdXJyaWN1bHVtLWJyZWl0YmFydC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMzAyMDAyMjIy) Breitbart A popular head high school football coach was allegedly fired by a Massachusetts public school after objecting to the racially-charged curriculum taught to his children in the school district.

The Dedham Public Schools district terminated David Flynn after he disagreed with the move to a social justice school curriculum, the Daily Wire reported. Flynn has two children in the district, one in middle school and the other in elementary school. clean_body: President Trump is COMMITTED to Putting America First! Derek, In his first speech since leaving office, President Trump reiterated his commitment to keeping the Republican Party united and slammed Democrats who have done nothing but push an out-of-touch agenda since taking office that's put New Hampshire last. President Trump's goals of Putting America First and uniting the Republican Party are the same goals of the New Hampshire Republican Party. Maggie Hassan has shown us exactly where she stands. To make matters worse, she's been SILENT while national Democrats have put their interests ahead of Granite Staters. Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer think that YOU should bail out blue state Governors like Andrew Cuomo and Gavin Newsom while punishing responsible Governors like our Governor Chris Sununu. When New Hampshire needs her most, Maggie Hassan is nowhere to be found. The path to a new Republican Majority that will put New Hampshire & America First runs right through New Hampshire in 2022 -**** SECURE DONOR BOX Derek, can we count on you to donate whatever you can today to help retire Maggie Hassan and flip the United States Senate to Republican control in 2022? | New Hampshire Republican State Committee 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301 |

subject: Hey Joe Biden, bring back our jobs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM JOSH,
body:
Joe Biden has failed American workers.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001buYYadjh71Qz2kcxpXuUObYNGSNmae9EHQIgKkQAONWUdCCcB21iJoKA8wZiTlv9MQkLtObAXP5m-d1STKhXAwosJ3JiCqEKRQAC6H-HQdCghgT-pTtNYfnuEcvtezdSJILPpTEqTZUhBWzudMBWuuXaJZy0tqx3E2mnIMrcFZ6u-yovLs-l6l1b9F4N8gdpyozp-Cl5hS1mxPdP5d1mhr02x6oF4UAiGjaeue0bJkMQlqP5FoGWCcgVpFyEjmQNqFAJB54HMtj_DWCcJ6oJtHYsdAcPJriUgrPhUvDkkt9GHLF5XMJSuuAVKNaTeUuix54uIHiVuwXSFPzwP00RFqt1lP9LbqtcbhL8V6X-uT4bk7zPIciNPuQlvHKkP2h1H87EZP0STin9LKC0kLgIhV0HMwpbfj19&c=W2Cu8jDoR61V5f55oTZ4Fz8zfGtj24Z_jVh8HLHcPmtFBH-CtEUmlg==&ch=2-SbxDlvgHt1rD3TbCVBqaz36stlYVBtJWbM752dcRm9T0GuQNVKtQ==)
**Joe Biden has failed American workers. **

Within hours of stepping into the White House, **Joe Biden** signed off on shutting down the **Keystone XL Pipeline**. Thanks to Biden's actions on his first day as president, **THOUSANDS** of American energy workers are without a job today, leaving thousands of families across the country without food on the table for dinner tonight.
**[REOPEN THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001buYYadjh71Qz2kcxpXuUObYNGSNmae9EHQIgKkQAONWUdCCcB21iJoKA8wZiTlv9MQkLtObAXP5m-d1STKhXAwosJ3JiCqEKRQAC6H-HQdCghgT-pTtNYfnuEcvtezdSJILPpTEqTZUhBWzudMBWuuXaJZy0tqx3E2mnIMrcFZ6u-yovLs-l6l1b9F4N8gdpyozp-Cl5hS1mxPdP5d1mhr02x6oF4UAiGjaeue0bJkMQlqP5FoGWCcgVpFyEjmQNqFAJB54HMtj_DWCcJ6oJtHYsdAcPJriUgrPhUvDkkt9GHLF5XMJSuuAVKNaTeUuix54uIHiVuwXSFPzwP00RFqt1lP9LbqtcbhL8V6X-uT4bk7zPIciNPuQlvHKkP2h1H87EZP0STin9LKC0kLgIhV0HMwpbfj19&c=W2Cu8jDoR61V5f55oTZ4Fz8zfGtj24Z_jVh8HLHcPmtFBH-CtEUmlg==&ch=2-SbxDlvgHt1rD3TbCVBqaz36stlYVBtJWbM752dcRm9T0GuQNVKtQ==)**
**Part of putting America FIRST is putting American workers FIRST.** As Ohio's next Senator, I pledge to put American workers first at every turn as I fight to protect our jobs, economic freedom, and individual liberty. [**Right now, reopening the Keystone XL Pipeline is of the utmost importance in getting American workers back on their feet.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001buYYadjh71Qz2kcxpXuUObYNGSNmae9EHQIgKkQAONWUdCCcB21iJoKA8wZiTlv9MQkLtObAXP5m-d1STKhXAwosJ3JiCqEKRQAC6H-HQdCghgT-pTtNYfnuEcvtezdSJILPpTEqTZUhBWzudMBWuuXaJZy0tqx3E2mnIMrcFZ6u-yovLs-l6l1b9F4N8gdpyozp-Cl5hS1mxPdP5d1mhr02x6oF4UAiGjaeue0bJkMQlqP5FoGWCcgVpFyEjmQNqFAJB54HMtj_DWCcJ6oJtHYsdAcPJriUgrPhUvDkkt9GHLF5XMJSuuAVKNaTeUuix54uIHiVuwXSFPzwP00RFqt1lP9LbqtcbhL8V6X-uT4bk7zPIciNPuQlvHKkP2h1H87EZP0STin9LKC0kLgIhV0HMwpbfj19&c=W2Cu8jDoR61V5f55oTZ4Fz8zfGtj24Z_jVh8HLHcPmtFBH-CtEUmlg==&ch=2-SbxDlvgHt1rD3TbCVBqaz36stlYVBtJWbM752dcRm9T0GuQNVKtQ==)
**[**REOPEN THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001buYYadjh71Qz2kcxpXuUObYNGSNmae9EHQIgKkQAONWUdCCcB21iJoKA8wZiTlv9MQkLtObAXP5m-d1STKhXAwosJ3JiCqEKRQAC6H-HQdCghgT-pTtNYfnuEcvtezdSJILPpTEqTZUhBWzudMBWuuXaJZy0tqx3E2mnIMrcFZ6u-yovLs-l6l1b9F4N8gdpyozp-Cl5hS1mxPdP5d1mhr02x6oF4UAiGjaeue0bJkMQlqP5FoGWCcgVpFyEjmQNqFAJB54HMtj_DWCcJ6oJtHYsdAcPJriUgrPhUvDkkt9GHLF5XMJSuuAVKNaTeUuix54uIHiVuwXSFPzwP00RFqt1lP9LbqtcbhL8V6X-uT4bk7zPIciNPuQlvHKkP2h1H87EZP0STin9LKC0kLgIhV0HMwpbfj19&c=W2Cu8jDoR61V5f55oTZ4Fz8zfGtj24Z_jVh8HLHcPmtFBH-CtEUmlg==&ch=2-SbxDlvgHt1rD3TbCVBqaz36stlYVBtJWbM752dcRm9T0GuQNVKtQ==)**
---
---
So, Friend, help me send a message to Joe Biden - [**It 's time to reopen the Keystone XL Pipeline.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001buYYadjh71Qz2kcxpXuUObYNGSNmae9EHQIgKkQAONWUdCCcB21iJoKA8wZiTlv9MQkLtObAXP5m-d1STKhXAwosJ3JiCqEKRQAC6H-HQdCghgT-pTtNYfnuEcvtezdSJILPpTEqTZUhBWzudMBWuuXaJZy0tqx3E2mnIMrcFZ6u-yovLs-l6l1b9F4N8gdpyozp-Cl5hS1mxPdP5d1mhr02x6oF4UAiGjaeue0bJkMQlqP5FoGWCcgVpFyEjmQNqFAJB54HMtj_DWCcJ6oJtHYsdAcPJriUgrPhUvDkkt9GHLF5XMJSuuAVKNaTeUuix54uIHiVuwXSFPzwP00RFqt1lP9LbqtcbhL8V6X-uT4bk7zPIciNPuQlvHKkP2h1H87EZP0STin9LKC0kLgIhV0HMwpbfj19&c=W2Cu8jDoR61V5f55oTZ4Fz8zfGtj24Z_jVh8HLHcPmtFBH-CtEUmlg==&ch=2-SbxDlvgHt1rD3TbCVBqaz36stlYVBtJWbM752dcRm9T0GuQNVKtQ==)

Thanks for your support,

Josh Mandel
_Conservative for U.S. Senate (R-OH)
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001buYYadjh71Qz2kcxpXuUObYNGSNmae9EHQIgKkQAONWUdCCcB21iJoKA8wZiTlv9MQkLtObAXP5m-d1STKhXAwosJ3JiCqEKRQAC6H-HQdCghgT-pTtNYfnuEcvtezdSJILPpTEqTZUhBWzudMBWuuXaJZy0tqx3E2mnIMrcFZ6u-yovLs-l6l1b9F4N8gdpyozp-Cl5hS1mxPdP5d1mhr02x6oF4UAiGjaeue0bJkMQlqP5FoGWCcgVpFyEjmQNqFAJB54HMtj_DWCcJ6oJtHYsdAcPJriUgrPhUvDkkt9GHLF5XMJSuuAVKNaTeUuix54uIHiVuwXSFPzwP00RFqt1lP9LbqtcbhL8V6X-uT4bk7zPIciNPuQlvHKkP2h1H87EZP0STin9LKC0kLgIhV0HMwpbfj19&c=W2Cu8jDoR61V5f55oTZ4Fz8zfGtj24Z_jVh8HLHcPmtFBH-CtEUmlg==&ch=2-SbxDlvgHt1rD3TbCVBqaz36stlYVBtJWbM752dcRm9T0GuQNVKtQ==)_

**The key to keeping Ohio RED in 2022 lies in maintaining the Trump Coalition**, and **Josh Mandel** , _President Trump 's #1 Ally in Ohio_, is fighting to do just that.

Josh has made it clear that he's fighting for the little guy. Working class Americans are the backbone of this country, and the backbone of the Trump Coalition,**and that 's just who he's going to Washington to fight for** \-- _NOT for the country club Republicans and Harvard elites. _

body:
I wanted you to be amongst the first to hear the news. Today I am officially announcing my candidacy for reelection in 2022.
****I wanted you to be amongst the first to hear the news. Today I am officially announcing my candidacy for reelection in 2022.

I am so proud of everything Republicans have accomplished in the past four years under President Trump. We passed meaningful tax cuts in 2017, confirmed _**three**_ Supreme Court Justices, including **Hoosier Amy Coney Barrett** , and worked to defund sanctuary cities.

But now, Joe Biden and the Democrats are tearing down everything we worked for. Winning back the Senate Majority in 2022 is critical to the future of the America First agenda.

**Right now, we must build a solid foundation for the fight that lays ahead. That 's why I'm asking you today to become a founding member of my 2022 reelection campaign. Can I count on you?**

body:

****

.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00138u_7PM5-HoN1VVhYWIx1zOOwJVPkRjZOlIb5P9qQ9ieaXvBE71QFfuJfhZrq-3iZJgRB7JA0UVLq9Ntg84wkuzA-uy5QWmhnFwg12Eh3VkcvzojAeRUFPtGbCuhvlzkb-lsvGctO6Re7AtdgFkBlB5lEn89tIoST-bw9sJqqKF1O-v-d2pX1Mp9Avx6lTzEcDjYDys6ADNROlMkVCq_HhDqAF3f2RZwQQLxq8ed7Fe26aGcCFcVozP-eLZcnrRTPrs6JBKYI7g7Kg4gy5dKDApJHVnrgl26QNqFT5Lc0SrfOobJO0t9Hgcwuv3BChaW0EnjcWEdranVAzbofhCyx7YZU9eNybatYs4xpbTgUQBX8Z-4qTRaMF8aNiHwSwzKgurc8V8bUZyJmHaJe_vJqV4UIY1Y1hnkQV-J77R0Nb1PrCp9hUUBy1bP0PbkniNAFHgUNRqUM0s=&c=IszKVCbvBVDiHbQpeE3z-DjDP5ykctoD4NfLyvMSyF-n8AciuuuTgQ==&ch=DlqvqlfxilL1vNh4FvTH2VGsqDVONlkl902RRHRu0bEZ5S3sDnxD0A==)
Friend,

Right now the Democrats are feeling bold. They have good reason to be too.

**The Democrats have an almost unlimited warchest to spend their dark money, especially in CA-48.**

Here is what's at stake for Michelle Steel's seat if we are not able to keep up with their dark money:

-> A Democratic Majority in the House

-> A failed socialist agenda

-> Job-killing regulations

-> Higher taxes

It's hard to overstate just how serious this situation is. _Every. Single. Vote. which aims to make voting easier and more accessible by funding ballot initiatives to expand vote-by-mail and automatic voter registration. After record turnout during the 2020 election, Republican-held legislatures are now doing _everything in their power_ to make it **harder** to vote.
By weaponizing Donald Trump’s disinformation about voter fraud, legislatures in states like Georgia, Iowa, and Arizona are now passing voter suppression laws at warp speed. In fact, a recent report by the Brennan Center for Justice found that 253 bills aimed to restrict voting access have been introduced in 43 states in 2021 alone.
**_What can we do?_ [We can start by passing the _John Lewis Voting Rights Act_ , which will help restore and protect voting rights.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/25721152/274726300/-1596900047?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgzMzY4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg4OTk2ZGY3LTkzN2ItZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5Hftx5AmUhPUmeWEhl8CPXjOuHPhDtkVp79i33GdY4Y=&emci=1950db02-8f7b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=88996df7-937b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&ceid=16080230) **[**S**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/25721153/274726301/-1702180515?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgzMzY4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg4OTk2ZGY3LTkzN2ItZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5Hftx5AmUhPUmeWEhl8CPXjOuHPhDtkVp79i33GdY4Y=&emci=1950db02-8f7b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=88996df7-937b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&ceid=16080230)[**ign on to demand Congress protect voters' rights by passing the _John Lewis Voting Rights Act_ >>**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/25721154/274726302/-1702180515?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgzMzY4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg4OTk2ZGY3LTkzN2ItZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5Hftx5AmUhPUmeWEhl8CPXjOuHPhDtkVp79i33GdY4Y=&emci=1950db02-8f7b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=88996df7-937b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&ceid=16080230)

Our country has a long, fraught history when it comes to voter suppression – something the late Congressman John Lewis knew all too well.
That's why 56 years ago – during the height of the Civil Rights movement – Congress passed _the Voting Rights Act_ , which aimed to protect the votes of people of color by making discriminatory voting practices illegal.
Unfortunately, in 2013, the Supreme Court’s Shelby County v Holder decision essentially gutted the _Voting Rights Act._
**[Now, it’s up to us to restore it.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/25721156/274726304/-1596900047?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgzMzY4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg4OTk2ZGY3LTkzN2ItZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5Hftx5AmUhPUmeWEhl8CPXjOuHPhDtkVp79i33GdY4Y=&emci=1950db02-8f7b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=88996df7-937b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&ceid=16080230) [Will you help the _John Lewis Voting Rights Act_ gain momentum by adding your name to our petition?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/25721157/274726305/-1596900047?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgzMzY4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg4OTk2ZGY3LTkzN2ItZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5Hftx5AmUhPUmeWEhl8CPXjOuHPhDtkVp79i33GdY4Y=&emci=1950db02-8f7b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=88996df7-937b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&ceid=16080230)**
Thanks for taking action,
– _Every. Single. Vote._

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: THIS WEEK: Several Action Items, including stopping the Democrats federal takeover of elections
disclaimer_text: paid for by government funds
body:
| |
---
There’s a lot going on on Capitol Hill this week, so we’re juggling several different balls, and we need your help to keep them in the air.

**First, if you have not had a chance yet to sign our petitions[opposing the confirmation of Neera Tanden](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDYxLWZiM2U2ZDIyMmRmMTQ2MWJiOTIxZDM3ZWY1MjcxYjBh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ibG9ja3RhbmRlbi5hY3QudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvP21pZD00MzQ0MyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=TtxJWPLoK2e9uWNVcH4kRw) to serve as Director of the Office of Management and Budget, and [opposing Xavier Becerra](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDYxLWZiM2U2ZDIyMmRmMTQ2MWJiOTIxZDM3ZWY1MjcxYjBh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ibG9ja2JlY2VycmEuYWN0LnRlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHMub3JnLz9taWQ9NDM0NDMmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=uMkWkw5EalqkllYokpri9w) to serve as Secretary of the Department of Health and Human Services, please take a moment to do so.** Both of those nominations are in trouble, and we may be able to defeat them and force President Biden to replace them with nominees closer to the mainstream.

**Second, could you please take a moment and[review our proposed Plan of Action for 2021-22](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDYxLWZiM2U2ZDIyMmRmMTQ2MWJiOTIxZDM3ZWY1MjcxYjBh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZm9ybXMvMjAyMS0yMDIyLWFjdGlvbi1wbGFucy8_bWlkPTQzNDQzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=dQv7feEHlHsEZnLXUZm1jQ), and let us know what you think?**

**Also this week, House Democrats are going to try to jam through the House a piece of legislation that’s so bad, on so many fronts, we don’t even know where to start.** It’s designated H.R. 1, and they call it the “For the People Act.” It SHOULD be called the “Federal Takeover of Elections Act,” because it overturns more than two centuries of American political tradition by federalizing election law and administration. It’s an 800-page monstrosity that’s actually an omnibus of more than a dozen different pieces of legislation, each of which would make life more difficult for those trying to employ their First Amendment rights to influence public policy or the outcome of elections.

We will have some action items for you, [including a How-To Guide to help you navigate opposing this bill](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDYxLWZiM2U2ZDIyMmRmMTQ2MWJiOTIxZDM3ZWY1MjcxYjBh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL0hSMV9Qcm90ZWN0X0VsZWN0aW9uX0ludGVncml0eV9Ib3dfVG9fR3VpZGUucGRmP21pZD00MzQ0MyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=tXM__QJPW3grLUfrgSecpQ). But first, here’s just a partial list of what’s in this bill, and how it would change the way we conduct elections in America:
* **Creates welfare for politicians, AND forces taxpayers to fund candidates and ideas they oppose:** Under H.R. 1, government money would flow to candidates for federal office on a six-to-one ratio for contributions up to $200. That is, for every $200 contribution raised, the candidate would be entitled to a check for $1,200 paid for by government funds. That means many taxpayers would be required to fund candidates who support policies they oppose. Thomas Jefferson said that, “To compel a man to furnish funds for the propagation of ideas he disbelieves and abhors is sinful and tyrannical.” He was right.

* **It’s an incumbent protection scheme:** Under H.R. 1, some candidates would be lured into engaging a Trojan horse. The legislation offers candidates for federal office a six-to-one match on contributions up to $200, so a $200 contribution magically becomes a $1,400 contribution. That must look very attractive to the kind of candidates who believe they’ll have a hard time raising money. What they may not realize, though, is that in order to receive the matching funds, the candidate also must agree to limit his fundraising threshold to $1,000 per individual, rather than the current individual contribution limit of $5,600 per cycle. So some candidates will find it much easier to raise money, but, because they’ve agreed to limit their ability to raise money, they won’t be able to raise enough to win.

* **Destroys state-level voter verification efforts:** Under H.R. 1, individuals would no longer be required to provide a government-issued photographic voter identification card to prove who they are before they register to vote, and voters arriving at a polling place would no longer be required to show ID. Instead, they could simply sign a piece of paper saying they are who they say they are. This provision would gut state-level efforts to enhance election integrity.

* **Further opens the door to vote fraud by mandating same-day registration:** Under H.R. 1, states would be required to implement same-day registration, up to and including Election Day registration. Without any time to verify voter information, election officials would be hard pressed to prevent voter fraud.

* **Massively expands voter rolls, by registering voters automatically, including non-citizens:** Under H.R. 1, states would be mandated to automatically register to vote every person, regardless of citizenship status, who enrolls in certain government programs. Visiting the Department of Motor Vehicles or signing up to receive welfare benefits could lead to automatic registration. Because certain government programs are not limited to citizens, this could lead to ineligible persons, such as illegal immigrants, automatically being added to voter rolls.

* **Prohibits states from rejecting any voter application:** Under H.R. 1, it would become a criminal act to refuse to accept a voter registration application, even if that the application does not meet the necessary requirements.

* **Prohibits challenges to voter eligibility:** Under H.R. 1, it would also become a criminal act to challenge any registrant’s eligibility to register or to vote.

* **Federalizes and greatly expands the use of absentee mail-in ballots:** Under H.R. 1, all states would be required to allow registered voters to cast an absentee ballot by mail without providing a reason for doing so, and all states would be required to accept as valid, and count, mailed-in ballots that are postmarked before or on Election Day, so long as they are received up to ten days after the election.

* **Provides for 16- and 17-year-olds to vote:** Under H.R. 1, 16- and 17-year-olds would be allowed to register, even though they are not legally allowed to vote until they reach the age of 18. Under the new law, though, because the new law makes it a crime to challenge any registrant’s ability to register or to vote, those 16- and 17-year-olds will be able to vote, because we won’t any loger be requiring proof of identification on Election Day – and, even if a 16- or 17-year-old were challenged, all he would have to do is sign a statement declaring that he is eligible to vote.

* **Turns the Federal Election Commission from a bipartisan election watchdog into a partisan attack machine:** Under current law, the Federal Election Commission is a bipartisan election law enforcement authority, composed of three Republicans and three Democrats, and a requirement of four votes to engage in any enforcement action. As a consequence, only enforcement actions that earn bipartisan support can be undertaken. Under H.R. 1, the FEC would be composed of two Republicans and two Democrats, with a fifth member – the chairman – to be selected by the President. This would turn the FEC into a partisan attack dog, controlled by the party that controls the White House.

* **Removes accountability during redistricting:** Currently, most states empower their legislatures to redraw district lines for federal and state legislative seats after every decennial census. Because those state lawmakers are elected by their constituents, they can be held accountable at the ballot box. Under H.R. 1, the power to redraw district lines would be turned over to unelected, unaccountable “redistricting commissions.”

The bill will be on the floor Wednesday and Thursday, with a vote on final passage expected Thursday evening. _Please[call your Representative](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDYxLWZiM2U2ZDIyMmRmMTQ2MWJiOTIxZDM3ZWY1MjcxYjBh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaG91c2UuZ292L3JlcHJlc2VudGF0aXZlcy9maW5kLXlvdXItcmVwcmVzZW50YXRpdmU_bWlkPTQzNDQzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=O4iP-IUtKFhx6wKvYPEeTw) and urge him or her to VOTE NO ON H.R. 1! _Also, don’t forget to [read through our How-To Guide](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDYxLWZiM2U2ZDIyMmRmMTQ2MWJiOTIxZDM3ZWY1MjcxYjBh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL0hSMV9Qcm90ZWN0X0VsZWN0aW9uX0ludGVncml0eV9Ib3dfVG9fR3VpZGUucGRmP21pZD00MzQ0MyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=xSJksTgZJRexMGw7XE3scg) for more details on other actions you can take.

**Finally, on the Senate side, they’ll be taking up the $1.9 TRILLION coronavirus relief package that just passed the House.** Here’s what we wrote about it last week:
Last Friday, House Democrats took another step toward the passage of their $1.9 trillion coronavirus relief package. They call it “The American Rescue Plan.” House Republicans Whip Steve Scalise, in an email to his GOP colleagues, called it Nancy Pelosi’s “Payoff to Progressives” Act.

This is a horrendous piece of legislation. Please make a plan to call your U.S. Representative and your two U.S. Senators to urge them to vote against this legislation. Tell them simply, “The coronavirus relief bill is horrible. It spends too much, wastes too much, and will work to prolong the lockdowns, not end them. Please vote AGAINST this bill!”

The 591-page bill follows the contours of the plan laid out earlier by President Biden. It includes so-called “stimulus” payments up to $1,400 per person for those making $75,000 per year or less, on top of the $600 per person they received from the last coronavirus relief package, the one that was enacted in December.

The legislation also extends the supplemental unemployment benefits beyond their current March 14 expiration date, and raises them to $400 per week from their current rate at $300 per week. Nutrition assistance and housing assistance can also be found in the bill.

There’s a massive Blue State Bailout in this bill -- $195.3 billion to state governments, and $130.2 billion to local governments. That’s money to bail out states and local governments that were in financial trouble before the coronavirus even arrived. Residents of fiscally prudent states and localities shouldn’t be dunned to bail out residents of states and localities that spent like the money was burning a hole in their pocket.

The bill includes an additional $170 billion for K-12 schools and higher education. Keep in mind, the coronavirus relief bill enacted in December includes $82 billion for education.

The bill includes $14 billion to research, develop, and distribute vaccines. And there’s $15 billion for the airline industry, too.

And, in a provision that has absolutely nothing at all to do with relief from the coronavirus, there’s a provision that would mandate an increase in the federal minimum wage to $15 per hour by 2025. That’s been on the progressive “wish list” since long before the coronavirus.

Here are three more provisions that have absolutely nothing to do with relief from the coronavirus: The bill authorizes $135 million to the National Endowment for the Arts, and another $135 million to the National Endowment for the Humanities. And, just for good measure, the bill allocates $200 million for the Institute of Museum and Library Services.

Some Democrat media consultant is going to cash in, big time. The bill contains $1 billion “to strengthen vaccine confidence in the United States,” “provide further information and education with respect to vaccines,” and “improve rates of vaccination throughout the United States.” The standard commission on that ad buy alone would fund about a dozen campaigns for the U.S. House of Representatives.

The House Budget Committee will take up the bill on Monday. Members of the Budget Committee will be working from text sent to them by nine of the 12 House committees that had a finger in the reconciliation pie. That is, nine of the 12 committees that received reconciliation instructions held some kind of hybrid hearing last week, while three skipped the exercise entirely. They figured they weren’t going to accept any GOP amendments, so why go to the trouble of holding even a virtual hearing?

It is expected that the bill will hit the floor of the House by the end of the week.

Let’s talk about this bill for a bit.

**First off, the bill is misnamed.** Its passage will “rescue” nothing. It will, instead, prolong the shutdown of businesses that many state and local governments ordered close to a year ago. That’s not what our fellow citizens think of as a “rescue.”

**Second, it’s hard to make an argument that this bill is necessary.** The unemployment rate has dropped to 6.3 percent. That’s lower than it was during the entire first six years of the Obama Administration; after his first (and only), less-than-one-trillion-dollar “stimulus” package in early 2009, he didn’t try again.

Meanwhile, growth in the gross domestic product was 33.4 percent in the third quarter of 2020, and 4 percent in the fourth quarter. Going forward, Goldman Sachs projects that the U.S. GDP for 2021 will grow at a rate of 6.8 percent. And while it’s true that the lower unemployment rate is caused at least in part by the decisions by many unemployed workers to leave the job market, it’s also true that we really have two different economies today – the economies in the states that locked down (lower growth, higher unemployment) and the economies in the states that did not (higher growth, lower unemployment).

**Third, we just passed a coronavirus relief bill back in December.** That bill costed out at $900 billion plus. And it hasn’t been spent yet. In fact, by some estimates, there’s about a trillion dollars in appropriated funds that have yet to be obligated from the previous coronavirus relief bills. And, by the way, the CBO projects that of the $1.9 trillion in spending authorized by this bill, about $700 billion won’t be spent until 2022. So much for “emergency” relief.

**Fourth, this bill contains a bunch of stuff that has nothing to do with the coronavirus, or relief from it** – a massive increase in the minimum wage, for instance. That’s been on the liberal Democrats’ wish list for years, since long before anyone had ever heard of the coronavirus. It’s a terrible idea under any circumstance – the Congressional Budget Office says it will cost 1.4 million jobs – but it’s a particularly bad idea to roll it into a bill that its supporters claim is designed to help those struggling to find work.

Beyond the minimum wage increase, there’s $135 million in funding for the National Endowment for the Arts, and another $135 million for the National Endowment for the Humanities, and $200 million for the Institute of Museum and Library Services. And there’s about $320 billion for a Blue State Bailout – money to bail out big-spending state and local governments that ran up huge debts over the last two decades. What has that funding got to do with the coronavirus?

But it’s worse than that.

**This bill isn’t just unnecessary and wasteful, it’s counterproductive.** By throwing such huge amounts of money at the problem – and giving those who receive its benefits a short-term “high” that ameliorates the damage caused them by the lockdowns – it actually harms our efforts to end the lockdowns. It reduces the pressure on state and local governments to work to find ways to reopen businesses and schools, and thereby prolongs the lockdowns.

_**In other words, this is a bill designed to keep the lockdowns going.**_

And that’s why we must defeat it.
That bill passed the House last week, by the smallest of margins. Now it goes to the Senate, where its passage is questionable. _Please[call your two U.S. Senators](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDYxLWZiM2U2ZDIyMmRmMTQ2MWJiOTIxZDM3ZWY1MjcxYjBh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2VuYXRlLmdvdi9zZW5hdG9ycy9zZW5hdG9ycy1jb250YWN0Lmh0bT8mbWlkPTQzNDQzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=GTnv6YNQuFl7fA1go8zfJQ) TODAY to urge them to VOTE NO ON THE CORONAVIRUS RELIEF BILL._

In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin

**Subject line:** We didn’t make it -- but we’ve got another chance
**Date:** March 1, 2021
Derek,
Yesterday was one of our strongest fundraising days of 2021. Despite that, we still came up short of our goal of reaching 5,000 individual contributions before the end of February. **Obviously, we’re disappointed.** **But here’s the good news:** We’ve decided to extend our deadline for 48 hours to execute one final push and reach our goal by midnight tomorrow. ****[**As of now, we are 1,381 contributions short of our 5,000 individual contribution goal. Dorothy McAuliffe

body:
This is too good to be true. Thanks, Obama.
****

State legislatures have introduced more than 165 anti-democratic bills that would restrict voting -- all since the last election when record turnout helped elect pro-democracy candidates up and down the ballot.
I believe a dedicated grassroots movement can stop the current assault on voting rights. But as Eric Holder said recently, _we shouldn't need to_. There should be strong democracy laws on the books that prevent voter suppression and gerrymandering.
The For the People Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act would write a whole new chapter for fairness in our democracy. We can't allow politicians to continue using tools of obstruction to erode the integrity of our democracy.

Passing both the For the People Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act -- which will expand access to the ballot and restore the protections of the original Voting Rights Act -- is the most direct and immediate way to stop this new wave of voter suppression.
If we can pass comprehensive democracy reforms that will protect civil rights and create more fair elections, we'll be on the right path to a more perfect union.
Thank you for your support,
Barack Obama

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. These misnomers -- and the false narratives around them -- are part of a coordinated scheme to formalize voter suppression tactics. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: == == == == == == State legislatures have introduced more than 165 anti-democratic bills that would restrict voting -- all since the last election when record turnout helped elect pro-democracy candidates up and down the ballot. I believe a dedicated grassroots movement can stop the current assault on voting rights. But as Eric Holder said recently, we shouldn't need to. There should be strong democracy laws on the books that prevent voter suppression and gerrymandering. The For the People Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act would write a whole new chapter for fairness in our democracy. We can't allow politicians to continue using tools of obstruction to erode the integrity of our democracy. == Passing both the For the People Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act -- which will expand access to the ballot and restore the protections of the original Voting Rights Act -- is the most direct and immediate way to stop this new wave of voter suppression. If we can pass comprehensive democracy reforms that will protect civil rights and create more fair elections, we'll be on the right path to a more perfect union. Thank you for your support, Barack Obama All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. To visit our website's about page, click ==. To make a secure, online contribution to support our critical mission, click ==. You can contribute via mail at the address below. Your input is critical to our success. Send us an email with your feedback: info@rslc.gop Connect with us on == and ==. Contributions to Republican State Leadership Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee 1201 F Street, NW, Suite 675, Washington, DC 20004. This expenditure was not made with the cooperation or prior consent of, or in consultation with, or at the request or suggestion of, any candidate, or person or committee acting on behalf of the candidate. What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at ==. | | RSLC | 1201 F Street NW Suite 675, Washington, DC 20004 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

name: Kat Cammack
subject: The Facts About the Left’s COVID “Relief”
body:
Don’t be fooled by the new bill...
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jJ7N4o4Em-uwMeazAYmLN3fKXxZCFEkl9ifE70wA_8hxkK8yMZfTKrr66jrwLr_xbIAqXKwjQ7aOc9R0QK5hoBdG68ptesFgU8pvRmyPqBLUK0n2_JCaGqdZsbt_N3tkTOJPcsNP-d6dDToDO-w4zPaW0Ux-Z_XJzkEQlb8-NKpVrdGGRGzhQz3TN5lpyt-l&c=7HfYkgnhR1d_iNBx4ceyKFaltVobD2QQ70_FEXe7HyDdSYAhT_R7nw==&ch=i9DlrkMsiudaNAD0Iw6IgkTANc6DSSxQpIqt60UcK3LBFUjYsTOAZg==)
---
| Patriot,
Don't be fooled by the new bill put forward by my colleagues on the other side of the aisle.
While they claim that its purpose is for COVID relief, a whopping 91 PERCENT of the trillion-dollar spending put forward by this plan will go towards areas that have absolutely nothing to do with the pandemic.
Instead, the bill would send YOUR tax dollars to bail out mismanaged Blue States and fund the wishlist projects of Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer.
---
| | | [SAY NO TO THE LEFT'S WISHLIST BILL](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jJ7N4o4Em-uwMeazAYmLN3fKXxZCFEkl9ifE70wA_8hxkK8yMZfTKrr66jrwLr_xbIAqXKwjQ7aOc9R0QK5hoBdG68ptesFgU8pvRmyPqBLUK0n2_JCaGqdZsbt_N3tkTOJPcsNP-d6dDToDO-w4zPaW0Ux-Z_XJzkEQlb8-NKpVrdGGRGzhQz3TN5lpyt-l&c=7HfYkgnhR1d_iNBx4ceyKFaltVobD2QQ70_FEXe7HyDdSYAhT_R7nw==&ch=i9DlrkMsiudaNAD0Iw6IgkTANc6DSSxQpIqt60UcK3LBFUjYsTOAZg==)
---
| The fact that the Left is using this crisis to line their own pockets is outrageous - this is government spending gone wild.
I won't let them make a difficult time for America even worse by using it as an opportunity to bankrupt the country with their pet-projects. But in order to stop this proposal dead in its tracks, [I need your support!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jJ7N4o4Em-uwMeazAYmLN3fKXxZCFEkl9ifE70wA_8hxkK8yMZfTKrr66jrwLr_xbIAqXKwjQ7aOc9R0QK5hoBdG68ptesFgU8pvRmyPqBLUK0n2_JCaGqdZsbt_N3tkTOJPcsNP-d6dDToDO-w4zPaW0Ux-Z_XJzkEQlb8-NKpVrdGGRGzhQz3TN5lpyt-l&c=7HfYkgnhR1d_iNBx4ceyKFaltVobD2QQ70_FEXe7HyDdSYAhT_R7nw==&ch=i9DlrkMsiudaNAD0Iw6IgkTANc6DSSxQpIqt60UcK3LBFUjYsTOAZg==)
Growing up, I saw first-hand the devastating effects of failed liberal policies when they led to my family losing our beloved, small cattle ranch. I won't let this bill create similar chaos for even more innocent, everyday Americans - help me put a stop to it!
---
| | | [CHIP IN $5 TO HELP](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jJ7N4o4Em-uwMeazAYmLN3fKXxZCFEkl9ifE70wA_8hxkK8yMZfTKrr66jrwLr_xoHCU63Mv821lM-BXoQmwvZz8z-FBkJIt9Z5rLRgs9WhCj6xSsgpHI8nIZmAyRrWtPRcgiXrSrQSvLVr9g8GhirhB7uJlq1eAHCY6V36OyeatSKS1gFURaiPxv6neXrCX6SXzkFkcF70=&c=7HfYkgnhR1d_iNBx4ceyKFaltVobD2QQ70_FEXe7HyDdSYAhT_R7nw==&ch=i9DlrkMsiudaNAD0Iw6IgkTANc6DSSxQpIqt60UcK3LBFUjYsTOAZg==)

clean_body: Don’t be fooled by the new bill... | | | | | | == | Patriot, Don't be fooled by the new bill put forward by my colleagues on the other side of the aisle. While they claim that its purpose is for COVID relief, a whopping 91 PERCENT of the trillion-dollar spending put forward by this plan will go towards areas that have absolutely nothing to do with the pandemic. Instead, the bill would send YOUR tax dollars to bail out mismanaged Blue States and fund the wishlist projects of Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer. | | | == | The fact that the Left is using this crisis to line their own pockets is outrageous - this is government spending gone wild. I won't let them make a difficult time for America even worse by using it as an opportunity to bankrupt the country with their pet-projects. But in order to stop this proposal dead in its tracks, == Growing up, I saw first-hand the devastating effects of failed liberal policies when they led to my family losing our beloved, small cattle ranch. I won't let this bill create similar chaos for even more innocent, everyday Americans - help me put a stop to it! | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Thank you for your support, | == | Kat Cammack | | | | == | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

name: Lauren Groh-Wargo
subject: Check out Marc Elias' Democracy Docket to stay informed about attacks on our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa370/34a064cc/1d83a4b6/7026031/18147690/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Friend - My friend Marc Elias founded Democracy Docket--the leading platform for litigation efforts against voter suppression across the country. [Democracy Docket](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa370/34a064cc/1d83a4b6/702603e/18147690/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.democracydocket.com/") is a must-read knowledge center for staying informed about Republican attacks on our democracy in 2021 and beyond. Democracy Docket works closely with a variety of voting rights leaders, including Fair Fight Founder Stacey Abrams. Stacey recently [wrote a piece](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa370/34a064cc/1d83a4b6/702603f/18147690/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.democracydocket.com/2020/12/how-georgia-went-blue/") for Democracy Docket about how Fair Fight flipped Georgia blue, to help people everywhere better understand the greatest challenges facing our democracy and what can be done to solve them. Marc and his team are critical allies in Fair Fight's fight for free and fair elections in Georgia and across the country. Voting rights [litigation in Georgia](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa370/34a064cc/1d83a4b6/702603c/18147690/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.democracydocket.com/state/georgia/"), for instance, expanded opportunities to cure ballots and lowered rejection rates dramatically: from 6.4% in 2016 to 0.4% in 2020. These fights, of course, continue, as Republicans are pushing a slew of election bills that will disenfranchise voters of color and other marginalized communities. The first step of fighting voter suppression? [Staying informed](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa370/34a064cc/1d83a4b6/702603d/18147690/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.democracydocket.com/subscribe/"). You can [sign up now](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa370/34a064cc/1d83a4b6/702603d/18147690/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.democracydocket.com/subscribe/") for Democracy Docket's exclusive email updates to receive the latest case alerts and voting rights news. Thank you for your continued engagement in the fight for democracy. \- Lauren Groh-Wargo
Senior Advisor, Fair Fight |

name: Team Maggie
subject: Mitch McConnell is doing whatever it takes to defeat Maggie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
A brand-new poll shows Senator Hassan DOWN by two points.
[](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc73f/2a380d31/214cecdb/f06b24/4146209165/VEsH/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")

Hello --
The GOP only needs to flip one seat to take back the Senate, and New Hampshire is on the top of their list. We knew it would be an uphill battle to keep this seat, but the road ahead just got even tougher.
Just last week, Mitch McConnell was making calls in New Hampshire to personally recruit his choice of GOP opponent for Senator Hassan. **And a recent poll showed Maggie DOWN by two points.**
Times like this are real tests of our campaign's strength. If we fail to reach our fundraising goal this month, it could invite far-right Republicans into this race.**[That's why we're asking, can you rush $3 or whatever you can to keep our Senate majority?](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc73f/2a380d31/214cecdb/f06b25/4146209165/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDMwMl9tbWNfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210302_mmc_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**

name: Kevin Hern
subject: Canceling Dr. Seuss
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
Help me fight back against cancel culture! Read more >>
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/e507d700f02a30dd/edd73330aa43a89cc3d6b838967d376c/34143) Peter, Today is one of my and my family’s favorite days. It’s National Read Across America Day, also known as “Dr. Suess Day” in honor of the revered children’s book author’s birthday. Today promotes literacy and creativity. Sadly, the “woke left” has made it all about themselves and cancel culture.

That’s right. They’ve “canceled” Dr. Seuss. Even President Biden ignored the revered author in the proclamation the White House sends out on this day every year. [**CHIP IN NOW TO SAVE HISTORY >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/e507d700f02a30dd/9b06bbb91053eb7bc3d6b838967d376c/34143) If not even Dr. Suess is safe from the cancel culture mob, I can only imagine what they will go after next! How can we learn from history if we keep canceling it? **[Please join me](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/e507d700f02a30dd/e50dec4d028509c6c3d6b838967d376c/34143)** today in fighting back against cancel culture and preserving our American legacy for our children and future generations. As the Lorax says, “Unless someone like you cares a whole awful lot, nothing is going to get better. It’s not.” -Kevin Hern id:2020-12-15-16:46:59:066t Paid For By Hern For Congress

name: Michael
subject: One Year of Walz' Emergency Powers?
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=one_year_of_walz_eme&n=1)
---
### Peter, did you see the latest email from our President, Jake Duesenberg? Please read the message below.
* * *
Peter \-- **Do you remember "Give us 15 days to slow the spread"?! We are approaching the one-year anniversary of that lie. We are approaching one whole year of Governor Walz' unilateral declaration of Emergency Powers.** These lies have led to businesses being closed down, healthy people ordered to stay in their homes, youth athletes to wear masks while playing sports, AND Covid positive patients admitted back to long term care facilities. Our team is working around the clock to try and stop the one-year anniversary from happening. It's absolutely amazing that we are here right now! Almost makes one think there is something bigger, and more nefarious at play. **The only way to stop politicians from taking our liberties is to hit them where it hurts - putting our message right in front of their voters. Which is why we just hired two more doorknockers and moved them up into Con Artist Dave Lislegard's district. And that pressure is****putting him and Julie Sandstede on the Defense!** Did you see that both legislators wrote [guests columns](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=UzxBEzGoayeHd1WPFO-VsytmHVRx0LEvSE6MSwFr96izGKgJsEnl3sZoWzJc4RxN_veVZg0_UYzyS7XXZ0uryJz92gY7lxBPbYVJo8zkQuoO3MFJiGBCxrve_1mZ1QJn8OyrU7nWlnQUN0DYJN5YiO_i5CJmVCJJ_Koh798ayU6LEz-UlLNl8EYWjmQZHBA3&e=e26c7fab8a1dd6578fda72c4b6d10c6f&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=one_year_anniversary&n=2&test_email=1&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=one_year_of_walz_eme&n=2) in the Hibbing paper trying to save face with their voters. From Dave Lislegard: _You’ve likely seen literature or heard radio**advertising from Action 4 Liberty** , a group based in the Twin Cities working day and night – during a time when our nation is already deeply divided – to agitate people, including those on the Iron Range._
## This means one thing. OUR PRESSURE IS WORKING!
We now have two different homes up north and I just hired another couple doorknockers. Our team is signing up new petition signers, talking to thousands of voters and distributing lit in all the neighborhoods. Even Dave Lislegard admits we are working around the clock to get our message out to voters. [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=e26c7fab8a1dd6578fda72c4b6d10c6f&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=one_year_anniversary&n=3&test_email=1&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=one_year_of_walz_eme&n=3) **Did you know that Julie Sandstede won her election by only 30 votes last November and President Trump won Dave Lislegard's district? By the time we're done with this, we'll have easily identified enough voters to flip those districts red!** Speaking of flipping districts, the Democrat machine is getting really worried that the legislature finally has a liberty champion who is willing to take the fight to them. They HATE our guy, Rep Erik Mortensen. Just last Thursday, Walz' rubber stamp and mask mandate cheerleader, Brad Tabke, announced he is running against Mort. Who announces a campaign this early? Looks like they have set our guy in the crosshairs. This battle is far too important to lose to the Democrat machine. We now know that Emergency Powers will be used and abused by tyrants. That's why we are working day and night to End Walz' Emergency Powers. And with Mort in office, we'll lead the fight to make sure it NEVER HAPPENS AGAIN! There are still more volunteer opportunities up in the Iron Range if you are looking to get more involved. Please [reach out](https://www.action4liberty.com/volunteer_end_walz_powers?e=e26c7fab8a1dd6578fda72c4b6d10c6f&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=one_year_anniversary&n=4&test_email=1&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=one_year_of_walz_eme&n=4) if you would like to join our field team to door knock. **If you don't have the time, your support means a lot to our team. We want to keep the momentum and continue holding these politicians accountable. We're quickly approaching the One-Year Anniversary of Walz' Emergency Powers. clean_body: | Peter, did you see the latest email from our President, Jake Duesenberg? Please read the message below. Peter \-- Do you remember "Give us 15 days to slow the spread"?! We are approaching the one-year anniversary of that lie. We are approaching one whole year of Governor Walz' unilateral declaration of Emergency Powers. These lies have led to businesses being closed down, healthy people ordered to stay in their homes, youth athletes to wear masks while playing sports, AND Covid positive patients admitted back to long term care facilities. Our team is working around the clock to try and stop the one-year anniversary from happening. It's absolutely amazing that we are here right now! Almost makes one think there is something bigger, and more nefarious at play. The only way to stop politicians from taking our liberties is to hit them where it hurts - putting our message right in front of their voters. Which is why we just hired two more doorknockers and moved them up into Con Artist Dave Lislegard's district. And that pressure is**putting him and Julie Sandstede on the Defense! Did you see that both legislators wrote in the Hibbing paper trying to save face with their voters. From Dave Lislegard: You’ve likely seen literature or heard radioadvertising from Action 4 Liberty , a group based in the Twin Cities working day and night – during a time when our nation is already deeply divided – to agitate people, including those on the Iron Range. This means one thing. OUR PRESSURE IS WORKING! We now have two different homes up north and I just hired another couple doorknockers. Our team is signing up new petition signers, talking to thousands of voters and distributing lit in all the neighborhoods. Even Dave Lislegard admits we are working around the clock to get our message out to voters. Did you know that Julie Sandstede won her election by only 30 votes last November and President Trump won Dave Lislegard's district? By the time we're done with this, we'll have easily identified enough voters to flip those districts red! Speaking of flipping districts, the Democrat machine is getting really worried that the legislature finally has a liberty champion who is willing to take the fight to them. They HATE our guy, Rep Erik Mortensen. Just last Thursday, Walz' rubber stamp and mask mandate cheerleader, Brad Tabke, announced he is running against Mort. Who announces a campaign this early? Looks like they have set our guy in the crosshairs. This battle is far too important to lose to the Democrat machine. We now know that Emergency Powers will be used and abused by tyrants. That's why we are working day and night to End Walz' Emergency Powers. And with Mort in office, we'll lead the fight to make sure it NEVER HAPPENS AGAIN! There are still more volunteer opportunities up in the Iron Range if you are looking to get more involved. Please if you would like to join our field team to door knock. If you don't have the time, your support means a lot to our team. We want to keep the momentum and continue holding these politicians accountable. We're quickly approaching the One-Year Anniversary of Walz' Emergency Powers. Let's STOP him from making them permanent.. In Liberty, Jake Duesenberg President, Action 4 Liberty Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113 Action 4 Liberty · United States

body:

| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V44zMcNKrvyO-Nl9kmaJmcGTFBfgpAEI_unyZLJKW6yYZL93xjjL1JdJyiPYsZyYNokeldOq54jQACNK8QnZjFXrFII3VO5J-9LHgPUZPW2zOgusmsrL0U-139t1FRi_Pt_-_SA6h6jumO36ZMBq9vo9yA-5Eb3icfwGWlhEYZYta2B7cdVSbg==&c=eGBBg39LtRa0Mp4dyQI8C2FGzeTLtddPH3kFWXa48HV90mhksAolcA==&ch=pUTpk7lpOrG5aE0qneDT6BtWKwrRFxgF_avL6SPPBNj_qib9ddn9Dw==)

| Peter,
As public servants, our number one priority is to keep our citizens safe. The Biden Administration has told our ICE agents to no longer seek deportations for crimes such as assault, DUI, solicitation, property crimes, money laundering, and others.
How is this in the interest of public safety?
We are a nation of laws, and we need to have a secure border and enforce our immigration laws to protect Americans from dangerous criminals coming across the border.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kyle=20Hupfer=2C=20Chairman=2C=20IN=20GOP?=
subject: FWD: My 2022 campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Have you heard about Senator Todd Young's big news? Click or Tap to learn more >> | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-470282?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | Hoosier Republican,

Senator Todd Young just made it official - **he's running for his second term representing Indiana in the U.S. Senate!**

We couldn't be more thrilled for the Senator as he embarks on this journey.

But the road ahead will be tough - the Democrat campaign machine is sure to make him one of their top targets this cycle, and he's going to need the support of dedicated Hoosiers like you to hold this critical seat.

Please, read through his campaign announcement below to learn more about this exciting new development!

Sincerely,
Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana Republican Party
---
|
---
| **From** : Todd Young
**Date** : Tue, Mar 2, 2021 at 11:00 AM
**Subject** : My 2022 campaign
**To** : All Supporters
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e3c08d8b3e&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
id:2020-04-23-15:43:59:705t
---
| Hoosier Republican,

[_**I’m writing to announce my campaign for re-election to the US Senate in 2022**_](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2a8b7563e6&e=1acd9bb3d6).

When you entrusted me with the honor of serving you five years ago, I swore an oath to defend the Constitution.

I also pledged to you that I would work on behalf of all Hoosiers to deliver conservative results.

I believe I have done so.

We reformed the tax code to let ALL Hoosiers keep more of their own money.

We made border security a priority, not just a talking point. I voted to fund the border wall and to defund sanctuary cities.

And we confirmed dozens of judges - including fellow Hoosier, Amy Coney Barrett, to the highest court in the land.

I believe I’ve lived up to my oath and kept my word, but I’m running because even after four years of conservative victories, the work is simply not complete and the tasks before us are immense.

Yes, we just put one election behind us. But the outcome of 2020 means we as conservatives must rethink the way forward for our country.

I hope to win votes in our state on behalf of a vision for conservative renewal. But ideas alone are not enough. I’ll need the continued support of [_**our team**_](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=493a19249a&e=1acd9bb3d6) \- you - to make that happen.

Our list of [_**over 300 endorsements**_](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=679c7b6f70&e=1acd9bb3d6) among those who lead our party is, I believe, the strongest in Hoosier history. But this campaign will take nothing for granted.

Progressives are ready to remake America as we’ve known it. Unfortunately, Democrat control in Washington means _their_ vision of top-down control will move closer to reality.

There’s no time to waste. As we launch our re-election campaign to re-secure a GOP majority in the US Senate, now is the time to put Indiana’s seat beyond all doubt. I ask that you [_**contribute here**_](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=95b37b81cf&e=1acd9bb3d6).

I will do everything I can to see America and Indiana are rebuilt, not remade, to suit a bottom up vision for our society, not top down. This requires a strong foundation.

But above all in this campaign, we must be hard on bad ideas but easy on good people. Those on the left may have a bad vision for this country, but they are our neighbors, co-workers, fellow parishioners, often our own family members.

We’re all Hoosiers and Americans who need one another. I’m a committed conservative. But Our Constitution will be meaningless without a spirit of shared decency and mutual respect, especially when we disagree.

I hope to make this campaign one in which we can bring Hoosiers closer together, and unite for a shared vision. Sometimes politics is tough, but I’m proud to have your support because I know you’ll hold me to a standard at least that high. It’s why I’m so proud to be your Senator, and humbly ask you for a chance to finish the work.

Thank you for standing with me and being part of the team to get this done.

Todd Young

PS. [_**Help kick off our re-election campaign by contributing today**_](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=74440da613&e=1acd9bb3d6).

We made border security a priority, not just a talking point. I voted to fund the border wall and to defund sanctuary cities. And we confirmed dozens of judges - including fellow Hoosier, Amy Coney Barrett, to the highest court in the land. I believe I’ve lived up to my oath and kept my word, but I’m running because even after four years of conservative victories, the work is simply not complete and the tasks before us are immense. Yes, we just put one election behind us. But the outcome of 2020 means we as conservatives must rethink the way forward for our country. I hope to win votes in our state on behalf of a vision for conservative renewal. But ideas alone are not enough. I’ll need the continued support of \- you - to make that happen. Our list of among those who lead our party is, I believe, the strongest in Hoosier history. But this campaign will take nothing for granted. Progressives are ready to remake America as we’ve known it. Unfortunately, Democrat control in Washington means their vision of top-down control will move closer to reality. There’s no time to waste. As we launch our re-election campaign to re-secure a GOP majority in the US Senate, now is the time to put Indiana’s seat beyond all doubt. I ask that you . I will do everything I can to see America and Indiana are rebuilt, not remade, to suit a bottom up vision for our society, not top down. This requires a strong foundation. But above all in this campaign, we must be hard on bad ideas but easy on good people. Those on the left may have a bad vision for this country, but they are our neighbors, co-workers, fellow parishioners, often our own family members. We’re all Hoosiers and Americans who need one another. I’m a committed conservative. But Our Constitution will be meaningless without a spirit of shared decency and mutual respect, especially when we disagree. I hope to make this campaign one in which we can bring Hoosiers closer together, and unite for a shared vision. Sometimes politics is tough, but I’m proud to have your support because I know you’ll hold me to a standard at least that high. It’s why I’m so proud to be your Senator, and humbly ask you for a chance to finish the work. Thank you for standing with me and being part of the team to get this done.
